prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-AOC4OGSSB-4OZ-CLR Product Type: LAB_SUPPLY Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 5.25 Inch Plastic Heavy Duty Gold Snifter Bottle Nozzle 4 oz Volume Description: The ASR Outdoor Gold Snifter Squeeze Bottles are an essential gold recovery prospecting tool for all gold prospectors. This handy bottle is perfect for extracting gold from your gold pans.

Simple to use, just squeeze the bottle and use the suction to grab gold flour and flakes and release them into one of our gold collection glass vials.

Each gold snifter bottle is 5" tall and holds 4 ounces of liquid, and can be used for countless hobbies and crafts. Make sure to keep some of these around whether you're gold prospecting in the field or doing clean up work in the garage.

Come in packs of 2, 3. 4, 6, 8 or 10 units. Search Terms: gold pan snifter bottle fine golds recovery mining equipment set gold panning kit mineral home lab how to gold pan Features: - Combined size of nozzle and snifter bottle: 5" x 2" diameter - Total Volume: 4 Fluid Ounces - Tube Length and Diameter: 4.75 inch x 3/16 inch; Tube Thickness: 1/32 inches - Ideal for fine gold recovery clean up; extendable nozzle with o-ring seal for reliable strong suction - ASR Outdoor compact gold panning snifter squeeze bottle with nozzle === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 5.25 Inch Plastic Gold Snifter Bottle 4 oz

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 5.25-in Gold Snifter Bottle Nozzle

anthropic.title_differentiation: Heavy Duty Squeeze Bottle, Gold Recovery Tool, Fine Gold Extraction, 4 Fluid Ounce Capacity, Extendable Nozzle, O-Ring Seal

openai.title_differentiation: 4 Oz Capacity, Extendable Nozzle, O-Ring Seal, Strong Suction, Fine Gold Recovery, Compact Prospecting Tool
